custom_css.gtk4: /* Sidebar hover gets a 15% transparent shade of your accent color */ .navigation-sidebar row:hover { background-color: alpha(#55ead4, 0.15); } /* Main panel items get full accent background and dark text on hover */ listview row:hover, gridview child:hover, listview row:hover label, gridview child:hover label { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; } /* Thicker 2px accent border for GTK4 popovers */ popover contents { border: 2px solid #55ead4; box-shadow: none; } /* Color context menu items on hover */ popover contents modelbutton:hover { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; } /* Libadwaita Tab Bar Overrides */ tabbar { background-color: #050606; } tabbar tab { padding: 4px 12px; color: alpha(#f5d63f, 0.5); background-color: transparent; } tabbar tab:checked { color: #050606; background-color: #55ead4; } tabbar tab:hover:not(:checked) { background-color: alpha(#55ead4, 0.12); color: #f5d63f; } /* Window Frame Accent Line */ window.main-window, window.dialog { border: 1.5px solid #55ead4; border-radius: 12px; } /* Clean Path-bar Breadcrumbs Buttons */ .path-bar button { background-color: alpha(#f5d63f, 0.04); border-radius: 6px; margin: 0 2px; padding: 4px 8px; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .path-bar button:hover { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; } /* Input Fields & Focus Glows */ entry, textview text { border: 1px solid alpha(#f5d63f, 0.1); border-radius: 6px; } entry:focus, textview text:focus { border-color: #55ead4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px alpha(#55ead4, 0.2); } /* Text Selection Highlights */ selection { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; }
custom_css.gtk3: button:hover, combo button:hover, stackswitcher button:hover { background-color: #55ead4; color: #f5d63f; } row:hover, cell:hover, row:hover label, cell:hover label { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; } row:selected, cell:selected { background-color: alpha(#55ead4, 0.30); color: #f5d63f; } entry:hover { border-color: #55ead4; } /* Thicker 2px accent border for GTK3 menus */ menu, .menu, context-menu { border: 2px solid #55ead4; } /* Color GTK3 menu items on hover */ menu menuitem:hover, .menu menuitem:hover { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; } /* Text Selection Highlights */ selection { background-color: #55ead4; color: #050606; }
